[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10101000 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 01011000 3
6 01011100 4
7 01110101 5
